contract_summary: Attaches a lock block (lkb) to a resource (rsb) by incrementing the rsb's reference count and storing the pointer in lkb->lkb_resource. The caller is responsible for eventually releasing this reference (e.g., via put_rsb) when the lkb is detached. The operation is unconditional and always succeeds.
